leads.name: Nguyen Minh Thao
leads.note: Ky gui lo quan ao Quang Chau ve Ha Noi. Can di nhanh duong bo.

leads.name: Tran Van Quyet
leads.note: Nhap si 500 cai balo hoc sinh Taobao ve Sai Gon. Dang thuong luong gia ky gui.

leads.name: Shop Giay Sneaker HN
leads.note: Khach can tim nguon hang giay the thao nhai MLB Quang Chau chat luong 1:1.

leads.name: Cong ty Gia Dung Sunhouse
leads.note: Lo hang may xay sinh to di chinh ngach Quang Chau -> Hai Phong. Da gui bang bao gia cuoc bien.

leads.name: Le Huu Dat
leads.note: Hoi ship 3 cai may in 3D cu. Da bao gia nhung khach che dat hon ben khac.

leads.name: Hoang Thuy Duong
leads.note: Can gom hang si phu kien toc tu Yiwu ve Ha Noi. Dang cho lien he lai lay so.

leads.name: Mai Phuong Anh
leads.note: Hoi van chuyen lo my pham noi dia Trung. Da lien he 3 lan nhung khong nghe may.
leads.failReason: Mat lien lac / Khong nghe may

tasks.title: Dam phan gia lo hang 500 balo voi xuong Taobao
tasks.desc: Ma khach hang: Tran Van Quyet. Dam phan giam gia ship noi dia Trung Quoc.

tasks.title: Dong kien go & dan tem ma HN-Thao cho lo 50kg quan ao
tasks.desc: Dong ky chong nuoc vi di mua mua. Chup hinh kien truoc khi xep xe.

tasks.title: Thong bao bao gia hai quan chinh ngach may xay Sunhouse
tasks.desc: Bao gia tron goi bao gom thue nhap khau va VAT. Cho khach duyet.

tasks.title: Kiem toan doanh thu tuan 1 thang 7
tasks.desc: Doi soat cac bill thanh cong trong tuan dau tien.

tasks.title: Tim nguon si giay MLB cho shop Sneaker HN
tasks.desc: Can tim 3 xuong khac nhau co phan khuc chat luong Super Fake va Rep 1:1.

tasks.title: Thong quan lo hang Quang Chau xe so 3
tasks.desc: Hang da ve toi Lang Son, dang lam thu tuc to khai.
